response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Strong phonetic match between the audio and the Reference JSON lyrics for both '初恋大戦争' and '大人なフリして。'. Discovered minor spelling/grammar errors in the Reference JSON (e.g., '横を練習' corrected to '予行練習', and 'とつがないじゃん' corrected to '手と手つなげないじゃん') and manually corrected them.
2. JSON Usage: Used the Reference JSON as a structural guide, but manually transcribed the long spoken MC/talking segment in between songs, since it was entirely absent from the lyrics references.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed dialogue blocks and song lines closely to vocal bursts. Handled rapid-fire speech in the song and MC segments by aggressively truncating end-times to match vocal starts and prevent cascading delays. Subtitled the visual title card of the second song during the non-vocal intro.

subtitles.original: なんども試作した
subtitles.english: Often I've rehearsed this,

subtitles.original: 予行練習もした
subtitles.english: I've done dress rehearsals, too.

subtitles.original: 夜明けになどなるな
subtitles.english: Don't let dawn come just yet.

subtitles.original: 大丈夫自分史上1番可愛い私なんだから
subtitles.english: It's okay, because I'm the cutest version of myself in history!

subtitles.original: 君は私と結ばれます
subtitles.english: You will be bound to me,

subtitles.original: 結ばれる運命なのです
subtitles.english: it is our destiny to be bound together.

subtitles.original: 本命あげちゃう めるきゅん
subtitles.english: I'll give you my heart, Mel-kyun!

subtitles.original: 誰にも渡さない 大戦争
subtitles.english: This is a great war I won't let anyone win!

subtitles.original: ときめいちゃいます
subtitles.english: My heart is throbbing!

subtitles.original: めるしーそれじゃ手と手つなげないじゃん
subtitles.english: Merci, at this rate, we can't even hold hands, can we?

subtitles.original: 内緒のデート
subtitles.english: Our secret date...

subtitles.original: ツイツイ キス
subtitles.english: Oops, a kiss!

subtitles.original: 甘くていいの
subtitles.english: Is sweet okay?

subtitles.original: ツイツイ ハグ
subtitles.english: Oops, a hug!

subtitles.original: こういうのがいいっしょ
subtitles.english: This kind of thing is the best, right?

subtitles.original: 初恋なんだもん
subtitles.english: Because it's my first love!

subtitles.original: 絶対譲らない覚悟です 大きな愛です
subtitles.english: I'm determined never to give in, it's a big love!

subtitles.original: 目を見て言って
subtitles.english: Look into my eyes and say it,

subtitles.original: 君の気持ち
subtitles.english: your feelings.

subtitles.original: ピュアラ ピュアラ
subtitles.english: Pure-ah, Pure-ah...

subtitles.original: ピュアラ ピュアラ
subtitles.english: Pure-ah, Pure-ah...

subtitles.original: ピュアラ ピュアラ
subtitles.english: Pure-ah, Pure-ah...

subtitles.original: ピュアラ ピュアラブ
subtitles.english: Pure-ah, Pure-ah, Love!

subtitles.original: はーい！ということで
subtitles.english: All right! So,

subtitles.original: ちょこたち3人の新曲でしたー！
subtitles.english: that was our new song by the three of us!

subtitles.original: 改めまして、ノエル様、ラミィ様と一緒にね
subtitles.english: Once again, in collaboration with Noel-sama and Lamy-sama,

subtitles.original: コラボ歌唱した「初恋大戦争」という新曲なんですけど
subtitles.english: we sang this new song, "Hatsukoi Daisensou"...

subtitles.original: 今回作詞作曲をMEDANSY様
subtitles.english: And this time, the lyrics and composition are by MEDANSY-sama,

subtitles.original: そして編曲をYousuke様にお願いいたしました！
subtitles.english: and the arrangement is by Yousuke-sama!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: 今回のテーマがバレンタインの日に
subtitles.english: The theme this time is about Valentine's Day,

subtitles.original: 3人の可愛い女の子たちが1人の男の子を手に入れるために
subtitles.english: where three cute girls, trying to win over one boy,

subtitles.original: バチバチに出し抜こうとするみたいな
subtitles.english: passionately try to outdo each other...

subtitles.original: 激甘なテーマ楽曲となっております！
subtitles.english: It is a super sweet themed song!

subtitles.original: いいね、可愛い！可愛い！
subtitles.english: Nice! So cute! Cute!

subtitles.original: そう！3人の声が合わさってめちゃめちゃアイドルソングになっているので
subtitles.english: Yes! Our three voices blended to make it a total idol song,

subtitles.original: ぜひぜひ皆様、聴いてください！
subtitles.english: so please, everyone, listen to it!

subtitles.original: えー、何回も聴きたいなー。
subtitles.english: I want to listen to it over and over.

subtitles.original: ねー何回も聴きたい！聴けるところあるのかな？
subtitles.english: Right, over and over! Is there a place where we can listen to it?

subtitles.original: こちらの楽曲、このあと24時から
subtitles.english: Actually, this song, starting from midnight tonight,

subtitles.original: 2月の15日0時からね、各種音楽サイトにて配信されます！
subtitles.english: which is February 15th at 0:00 AM, will be released on various music sites!

subtitles.original: やったー！聴ける！
subtitles.english: Yay! We can listen to it!

subtitles.original: そしてね、この配信後、すぐに
subtitles.english: And, right after this release, immediately...

subtitles.original: この楽曲のMVが！
subtitles.english: this song's music video...

subtitles.original: 公開されます！やったー！
subtitles.english: will be released! Yay!

subtitles.original: ぜひぜひ皆様いっぱい聴いて、MVの方にも感想とかね
subtitles.english: Please, everyone, listen to it a lot, and leave some thoughts...

subtitles.original: コメントいただけたら嬉しいかなって思います！
subtitles.english: and comments on the MV as well! We'd be so happy!

subtitles.original: お願いします！
subtitles.english: Please do!

subtitles.original: じゃあね、2人とも今日はありがとう！
subtitles.english: Well then, thank you both for today!

subtitles.original: お誕生日おめでとう！ありがとう、嬉しい！
subtitles.english: Happy birthday! Thank you, I'm so happy!

subtitles.original: 引き続き頑張ってね！
subtitles.english: Keep doing your best!

subtitles.original: 頑張るー！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: I'll do my best! Thank you!

subtitles.original: それじゃあ、ちょっと、おさらばじゃ！
subtitles.english: Well then, I'll be off!

subtitles.original: おさらば！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Bye-bye! Thank you!

subtitles.original: そして、ここからライブ後半となります！
subtitles.english: And from here, we enter the second half of the live show!

subtitles.original: まだまだゲストパートとか、なんと最後に
subtitles.english: We still have guest segments, and even at the very end,

subtitles.original: 重大告知もあるので、皆様、一緒に楽しんでいきましょう！
subtitles.english: a major announcement! Let's all have fun together!

subtitles.original: それでは、次のゲストはこちら！
subtitles.english: Now, here is the next guest!

subtitles.original: 大人なフリして。
subtitles.english: [Song: Pretending to Be an Adult]

subtitles.original: 急に会いたいって
subtitles.english: Suddenly saying you want to meet,

subtitles.original: いつものように準備してる
subtitles.english: I prepare just as I always do.

subtitles.original: 午前零時過ぎの終電で向かうって返した
subtitles.english: I replied that I'd head over on the last train past midnight.

subtitles.original: やめときなよって言われても
subtitles.english: Even if I'm told to stop...
